---
title: "Qwen — Data Profile"
subtitle: "Catalogo descritivo dos parquets do parser canonico v3"
source-title: "Qwen"
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| code-summary: "Setup — paths, conexao DuckDB, helpers"

import sys
from pathlib import Path

_this = Path.cwd()
_project_root = _this if (_this / "src").exists() else _this.parent
sys.path.insert(0, str(_project_root))

import pandas as pd
import duckdb
from itables import init_notebook_mode
init_notebook_mode(all_interactive=False)

from src.parsers.quarto_helpers import (
    fmt_pct, fmt_int, safe_int, show_df, show_md, plotly_bar,
    has_col, has_view, table_count, setup_notebook,
)

SOURCE_KEY     = "qwen"
SOURCE_TITLE   = "Qwen"
SOURCE_COLOR   = "#615CED"  # Qwen roxo/violeta
MUTED          = "#D1D5DB"
PROCESSED      = _project_root / "data" / "processed" / "Qwen"
TABLES         = ["conversations", "messages", "tool_events", "branches"]
AUX_TABLES     = ["project_metadata", "project_docs"]
ACCOUNT_FILTER = None

con = duckdb.connect()
_setup = setup_notebook(con, SOURCE_KEY, PROCESSED, TABLES, AUX_TABLES, ACCOUNT_FILTER)
```

> **Sobre Qwen:** parser v3 cobrindo 8 chat_types mapeados pra mode
> (chat / search / research / dalle), branches via DAG plano
> (`parentId`/`childrenIds`), reasoning_content em msgs QwQ, search_results,
> t2i/t2v/artifacts em ToolEvent, `pinned`/`archived` cross-platform,
> projects com `custom_instruction` + presigned files.

{{< include _template.qmd >}}

{{< include _template_aux.qmd >}}
